mapper.sql: id, session_id, type, task_id, content, status, file_code, file_id, url, name, message_id, agent_id, agent_code, session_mode, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO byai_showcase (id, session_id, type, task_id, content, status, file_code, file_id, url, name, message_id, agent_id, agent_code, session_mode, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sessionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fileCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{messageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{agentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{agentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sessionMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})

INSERT INTO byai_showcase (id, session_id, type, task_id, content, status, file_code, file_id, url, name, message_id, agent_id, agent_code, session_mode, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.sessionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.fileCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.messageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.agentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.agentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sessionMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update:
UPDATE byai_showcase
session_id = #{sessionId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
file_code = #{fileCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_id = #{fileId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
message_id = #{messageId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
agent_id = #{agentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
agent_code = #{agentCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
session_mode = #{sessionMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
